creator: lobo@bsd.com.br
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #66)

I am really glad to say that, with the above change, ALL my previous VMs started without any problems so far.

I had lockups with VMs that were using NAT networks created with the previous versions, but as soon as I changed to bridge, host only or pure NAT, they started normally.

I'll keep on with the tests and report my findings.
